title: Withdrawal from Koolyanobbing Iron Ore Option (Netley Minerals)
strategic_impact: Abandoned iron ore diversification after RC drilling returned uneconomic results. First signal that strategy needed a reset. Company pivots implicit resources focus back to gold.

title: Daniel Raihani appointed NED; David Izzard resigns
strategic_impact: First board refresh step. Removes Izzard (whose Rockford Partners / Fordrock cost the company ~$101K in admin services in FY2025). Raihani is a substantial shareholder (30M shares), aligning board incentives.

title: David Geraghty appointed Non-Executive Director
strategic_impact: Pivotal appointment. Ex-MinRes 21-year metallurgical engineer; architect of mine development and processing strategies. Signals to the market that FRS is reorienting toward production. On the same day a $500K placement at $0.05 completed (16× prior Feb price), confirming investor re-rating.

title: Geraghty appointed Non-Executive Chairman; Hannaford resigns; Turnbull joins
strategic_impact: Full board reset complete. Hannaford (whose consulting firm billed $128K in FY2025) departs. Adam Turnbull (substantial holder, 30M shares) added. New board is aligned, experienced and capital-light.

title: British Hill Gold Project acquisition (IMD Gold Pty Ltd)
strategic_impact: First production-ready asset: approved Mining Lease M77/1256; JORC 54,625 oz @ 1.66 g/t Au (Indicated + Inferred); >90% CIL recovery in metallurgical tests; open pit viable. Consideration equivalent to ~$6M in shares. Total resources now ~108K oz.

title: Hyden Project Holdings binding option (Lady Ada and Lady Magdalene gold deposits)
strategic_impact: Option for total $15.2M across three tranches over the Hyden Project including Lady Ada and Lady Magdalene deposits (described as 'cornerstone assets' in later investor materials). Formal acquisition pending — option extended Nov 2025. Ambiguity: completion status not confirmed in available source documents.

title: North Ironcap Gold Project acquisition (North Iron Cap Pty Ltd)
strategic_impact: Largest single resource addition in the programme: JORC Inferred 2.412Mt @ 1.37 g/t for 105,953 oz; Mining Lease M77/544 already approved. Consideration 42.1M shares + $2.78M cash (≈$70/oz). Total resources now ~214K oz.

title: $8.61M Placement at $0.205/share (42M shares)
strategic_impact: Share price has re-rated 16× from February's $0.01. Placement at $0.205 raises $8.61M to fund active acquisition pipeline. Market is now pricing in the consolidation thesis.

title: Burracoppin Gold Project acquisition (Askari Metals / First Western Gold Pty Ltd)
strategic_impact: Cheapest acquisition by oz: 82,700 oz JORC Inferred for only $700K total ($250K cash + $450K shares = $8.47/oz). Located 27km west of Ramelius Edna May Gold Mine — proximity strategic for future processing. Total resources now ~297K oz.

title: Westonia Gold Project (4 ELs) acquired from Kula Gold Ltd
strategic_impact: $500K cash + $1M conditional: four exploration licences adjacent to Ramelius Resources' Edna May Gold Mine. Simultaneously establishes tenement relationship with KGD, which becomes the platform for the takeover bid.

title: $1.87M equity investment in Kula Gold Ltd (7.37% at 2.2c/share)
strategic_impact: On same day as Westonia tenement purchase: FRS subscribes for 84.9M KGD shares at 2.2c, becoming KGD's largest external shareholder (7.37%). Sets up the takeover. Geraghty: 'We're creating strong bonds with gold companies in our area of influence.' Investment worth $6.65M by Dec 23.

title: Bid Implementation Deed signed with Kula Gold Ltd
strategic_impact: Formal legal commitment to an off-market takeover bid for all KGD shares. Locks in the transaction structure and consideration share ratio.

title: Horizon Minerals announces Lake Johnston divestment ($35M) — Binding HOA with FRS
strategic_impact: Horizon (ASX: HRZ) confirms 'Binding Heads of Agreement signed with Forrestania Resources Limited' for the Lake Johnston processing plant. This is the first public signal that FRS has secured the infrastructure that transforms the gold pipeline from theoretical to operational.

title: Lake Johnston acquisition HOA executed + $34M capital raising announced
strategic_impact: Transformational: 1.5Mtpa comminution and flotation plant; licensed to 2041; 86km² of mining leases; conversion study to begin immediately. $32M two-tranche placement at $0.175 (Bell Potter, sole lead manager); $2M SPP (later upsized to $5M). Removes greenfields construction risk from the production pathway.

title: Geraghty transitions to Executive Chairman; Brett Hodgins joins as Technical Director
strategic_impact: Operational shift: FRS moves from acquisition-building to hands-on development. Geraghty's $500K/annum package (subject to shareholder approval; willing to take in equity) signals institutional executive standard. Board now has both corporate (Geraghty) and technical (Hodgins) development leadership.

title: Jaurdi Hill – 3 binding agreements (ALS, FMM, DDM)
strategic_impact: Multiple mining and prospecting leases near Jaurdi Hill (22km NW of Ada Ann). Derry's Own and Pride of Jaurdis gold deposits (Jaurdi Hills-Dunnsville greenstone belt). Upfront: $1,399,660 + nominal consideration. Milestones: $350K on ≥25,000 oz JORC resource. Royalty only triggered after 25,000 oz produced. Expands Coolgardie hub; proximity to Beacon's Jaurdi plant is a stated strategic rationale.

title: Off-market takeover bid for Kula Gold Ltd formally launched
strategic_impact: Bidder's Statement dispatched to KGD shareholders. Off-market offer at FRS consideration share ratio. This is the public market commitment to the Kula acquisition strategy.

title: Mt Dimer, Mt Jackson and Johnston Range acquisition from Goldzone Investments
strategic_impact: Binds mineral rights (ex-iron ore) over three Eastern Goldfields project areas proximal to Lake Johnston infrastructure. $600K cash + shares ≡ $3.55M + milestone payments up to $3M total (on 50K and 100K oz JORC milestones per area). Fills out the Mt Dimer hub around the processing plant.

title: Kula takeover offer declared unconditional
strategic_impact: FRS waives all remaining conditions. Investment now worth $6.65M vs $2.89M cost. s.650D notice issued to ASIC and ASX. KGD control is secured; compulsory acquisition of remaining shares initiated.

title: Formal Lake Johnston Sale Agreement executed; ECI partners selected and engaged
strategic_impact: Full-form agreement signed with Poseidon Nickel Pty Ltd (Horizon subsidiary); $8M already paid. ECI team engaged: MBS Environmental (approvals/environment); OTOC (non-process infrastructure); Polaris Engineering (process plant); RG Mining (mine planning/scheduling/project execution); PwC (CAPEX/OPEX cost modelling). Production study underway.

title: Mantis Resources acquisition (3 ELs adjacent to Lake Johnston)
strategic_impact: $235K in shares for E63/2244, E63/2256 and application E63/2411 — directly around the Lake Johnston plant. Condition: Poseidon Nickel farm-in notice withdrawal confirmed. Consolidates land position around the processing infrastructure.

title: $37M total capital raising complete (Placement + SPP)
strategic_impact: Tranche 2 Placement ($18.8M) + SPP ($5M upsized) settles. Combined with Tranche 1 ($13.2M Nov 2025): $37M raised in total. Full funding secured for Lake Johnston acquisition and working capital for the development programme.

title: Gibraltar acquisition (M15/60 + M15/193 + P15/6203; Coolgardie hub)
strategic_impact: Mining leases with approved vat-leaching operation and known ore stockpiles. $2.5M in FRS shares; milestone payments up to $2.7M on first 150K oz JORC; 1% GRR only after 150K oz mined. The stockpiles become immediately monetisable (Westgold OPA, Feb 2026).

title: ACE Group (Kerry Stokes associates) + Timothy Roberts / Goodoil emerge as substantial shareholders
strategic_impact: Two high-profile WA cornerstone investors become substantial holders following Tranche 2 allotment. Wroxby Pty Ltd (ACE Group/Stokes) and Goodoil Pty Ltd (Roberts, 7.57%). Strategic validation of the production thesis from deep-pocketed WA mining operators.

title: Kula takeover bid closes; 90%+ voting power; compulsory acquisition of remaining shares proceeds
strategic_impact: FRS reaches the statutory 90% threshold under s.661A of the Corporations Act. Remaining KGD shares subject to compulsory acquisition. KGD is now a wholly-owned FRS subsidiary. Full control of Mt Palmer (M77/406), Johnson Range (M77/1263), Westonia ELs and related assets confirmed.

title: Mt Palmer 100% secured: Newcam Minerals Binding HoA (AMPPL, AJRPL, AMDPL)
strategic_impact: Acquires remaining 20% of Aurumin Mt Palmer Pty Ltd from Newcam ($18M in shares at $0.475) plus 100% of Aurumin Johnson Range Pty Ltd and Aurumin Mt Dimer Pty Ltd ($6.16M in shares + milestones). Fully consolidates Mt Palmer (M77/406), Johnson Range (M77/1263) and Mt Dimer hub. Mt Palmer described as historic high-grade gold mine; resource definition pending.

title: Lake Johnston divestment formally COMPLETES (Horizon Minerals confirms)
strategic_impact: Horizon ASX release: 'the sale of the Lake Johnston processing plant has been completed.' FRS is now the legal owner of the 1.5Mtpa plant and all associated infrastructure. Engineering conversion study (Polaris) and mine scheduling (RG Mining) can commence without encumbrance.

title: Mt Dimer, Mt Jackson & Johnson Range acquisition completes
strategic_impact: Goldzone deal formally completes. Mt Dimer hub now fully within FRS tenure.

title: Westgold Ore Purchase Agreement executed (Gibraltar stockpile ore)
strategic_impact: First revenue event. Westgold Resources (ASX: WGX) will purchase: (1) initial parcel ~150,000 dry tonnes from Gibraltar stockpiles; (2) up to 3 further parcels of ~200,000 dry tonnes each; at $48/dt delivered. $2.0M commencement payment payable within 7 business days. Initial parcel delivery before 31 March 2026. Total potential revenue: ~$7.2M (initial) to ~$35M (all parcels). Validates ore quality; provides cash bridge through Lake Johnston conversion period.

title: Karonie & Lake Rebecca Gold Projects acquired from Alchemy Resources (Goldtribe)
strategic_impact: Binding HoA to acquire 16 granted Exploration Licences (~942 km²) spanning the Karonie and Lake Rebecca Gold Projects from Goldtribe Corporation Pty Ltd, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Alchemy Resources (ASX: ALY). Consideration: $5M in FRS shares (7,725,587 shares at 10-day VWAP of $0.6472). Karonie holds an Inferred MRE of 2.96Mt @ 1.2g/t Au for 111,100 oz across the KZ5, Taupo and Parmelia deposits. Alchemy retains a 1% NSR on all minerals mined, excluding the first 110,000 oz from those three deposits. Located in the Kurnalpi Terrain greenstones ~100km east of Kalgoorlie — extends the Eastern Goldfields Hub into a proven gold corridor hosting Carosue Dam and other major deposits. Subject to due diligence (30 days), shareholder approval and regulatory approvals.
counterparties: Goldtribe Corporation Pty Ltd (Alchemy Resources, ASX: ALY)
